mapper.select: SELECT a.CONTRACT_NO, org04.manage_nm mgr_dept_nm, org04.company_nm mgr_dept_comp_nm, org04.department_nm mgr_dept_biz_nm, d.sw_nm, c.comp_cd partner_comp_cd, e.dept_nm partner_comp_nm FROM ts_work_sw_contract a LEFT JOIN v_organization_structure org04 ON org04.origin_Cd = a.dept_cd LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER c ON c.sub_cd = a.sub_Cd LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SW d ON d.sw_Cd = c.sw_cd LEFT JOIN tc_dept e on e.DEPT_CD = c.COMP_CD WHERE a.contract_no = #{contractNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT_SUB ( CONTRACT_NO, MGR_DEPT_NM, MGR_DEPT_COMP_NM, MGR_DEPT_BIZ_NM, SW_NM, PARTNER_COMP_CD, PARTNER_COMP_NM ) SELECT a.contract_no, org04.manage_nm mgr_dept_nm, org04.company_nm mgr_dept_comp_nm, org04.department_nm mgr_dept_biz_nm, d.sw_nm, c.comp_cd partner_comp_cd, e.dept_nm partner_comp_nm FROM ts_work_sw_contract a LEFT JOIN v_organization_structure org04 ON org04.origin_Cd = a.dept_cd LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER c ON c.sub_cd = a.sub_Cd LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SW d ON d.sw_Cd = c.sw_cd LEFT JOIN tc_dept e on e.DEPT_CD = c.COMP_CD WHERE a.contract_no = #{contractNo}
